page.title: Payee Suggestions
page.subtitle: Review AI-generated category suggestions for your payees and apply the ones you accept.

empty.title: No suggestions to review
empty.description: Use the Monize MCP tools from your AI client to generate payee category suggestions, then review them here.

applied: Categorized {payees, plural, one {# payee} other {# payees}}, created {categories, plural, one {# category} other {# categories}}.

discardConfirm.title: Discard suggestions?
discardConfirm.message: This permanently deletes this set of suggestions. Your payees and categories are not changed.

errors.noneSelected: Select at least one payee to apply.
errors.applyFailed: Could not apply the suggestions. Please try again.
errors.discardFailed: Could not discard the suggestions. Please try again.
